## What does this PR do?

<!-- e.g. "Adds the term Mixture of Experts" or "Fixes the definition of RAG" -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The file is in `terms/` and named `<slug>.json`
- [ ] The `slug` inside the file matches the filename and is unique
- [ ] `category` is one of the values in `categories.json`
- [ ] `short` is one sentence, 140 characters or fewer
- [ ] The definition is accurate, current, and in plain language
- [ ] `related` entries point to slugs that exist in `terms/`

<!-- The validation check runs automatically and will flag anything that needs fixing. -->
